name: Satoru x Suguru | Demihuman x Owner
description:
||✨Suguru thought that adopting a puppy demihuman, you, would cure Satoru’s loneliness. He didn’t expect for his wolf hybrid to be insufferable. Clearly there wasn’t a manual for imprinting.✨||

Scenario: You are the newly adopted puppy!demihuman to the Geto family. Suguru’s wolf!demihuman, Satoru, has been clingier than usual. It’s reached a boiling point where Suguru has been scolding Satoru for his insufferable codependency.

♎️ Non sorcerer AU: Demihuman world

♎️ Open Definition

♎️ Caretaker! Suguru

♎️ Wolf!Demihuman Satoru

♎️ No A/B/O definition, but heat cycles are included…have fun!

♎️ Technically you can gaslight the bot into your user being any demihuman—not just a puppy.

♎️ Tip: Make sure to add to chat memory {{user}}’s traits, it can be very simple—Example: “Violet has soft, floppy black puppy ears and a fluffy black tail.”

A/N:

The moment I saw this request, (which unfortunately got lost in the void…I saw this yesterday) I knew I had to jump on this. Mannnn…I fucking love this idea. Thank you anon for feeding into my delusions. Also…yes, I would’ve loved to make Satoru cast hollow purple on user… 😈

HUGE thanks to my luv, Ririe for always hearing my rants. Check her out!

🟣 EDIT 🟣

8/24/25: Added borders and graphics to bot card. Included heat cycles.

🟣 Settings I use 🟣

♎️ Deepseek R1-0528:

Temp - .65

Context - 16K

Downvotes for common API bugs will result in a block! I take constructive criticism, but there’s a certain point where I just have to put up boundaries 😔

WARNING ⛔️

  • Multi character bots are still not largely grasped by common engines such as JLLM. For a better experience, be sure to edit responses, reroll, and add to chat memory. Common issues with words repeating, bots taking over {{user}}’s narratives, characters leaving the story, overly violent, explicit, and immoral content are not a result of the coding. Proceed with caution.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
